heading: Repayment of advances for flood control
label: 618f Repayment of advances for flood control
text: The first $25,000,000 of advances made to the Colorado River Dam Fund for the project shall be deemed to be the sum allocated to flood control by and repayment thereof shall be deferred without interest until , after which time such advances so allocated to flood control shall be repayable to the Treasury as the Congress shall determine.section 617a(b) of this titleJune 1, 1987
